2026-04-14T15:27:04.1301459Z description: |
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1341252Z   Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1342167Z   Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1342965Z   predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1344046Z   analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1344850Z   Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1345341Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1345492Z on:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1345817Z   issues:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1346160Z     types: [opened]
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1346532Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1346916Z     inputs:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1347253Z       issue_number:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1347865Z         description: "Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)"
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1348580Z         required: true
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1348966Z         type: string
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1349337Z   roles: all
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1349680Z   reaction: eyes
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1349896Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1350061Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1350315Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1350477Z network:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1350801Z   allowed:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1351147Z     - defaults
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1351521Z     - "api.nuget.org"
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1351755Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1351904Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1352285Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1352727Z   add-labels:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1353071Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1353402Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1357281Z   remove-labels:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1357705Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1358046Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1358413Z   add-comment:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1358770Z     max: 2
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1359102Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1359474Z   assign-to-user:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1359831Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1360163Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1360524Z   close-issue:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1360863Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1361198Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1361544Z   noop:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1361919Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1362344Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1362674Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1363897Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1364928Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1365396Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1365997Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1366393Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1366824Z       inputs:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1367163Z         message:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1367721Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1368395Z           required: true
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1368788Z           type: string
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1369171Z         owners:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1370008Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1371213Z           required: true
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1371632Z           type: string
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1372009Z       steps:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1372497Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1373025Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1373506Z           env:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1374263Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1374918Z           with:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1375269Z             script: |
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1375674Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1376237Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1376642Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1376834Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1377577Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1378290Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1378789Z                 }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1379325Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1380040Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1380591Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1381008Z                 }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1381372Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1381783Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1381987Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1382202Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1382752Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1383313Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1414225Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1414494Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1416365Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1417827Z                 return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1418211Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1418437Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1418630Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1419205Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1419739Z                 try {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1420188Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1420775Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1421347Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1421870Z                   });
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1422313Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1422902Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1441536Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1442500Z                   });
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1442922Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1443557Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1463128Z                 }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1463546Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1464507Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1464744Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1464914Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1465457Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1466016Z                 return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1466397Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1466791Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1467444Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1468065Z                 return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1468473Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1468686Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1468852Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1469468Z               try {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1470135Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1470922Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1471579Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1472247Z                 return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1472633Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1472843Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1473112Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1475598Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1476544Z                 return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1476945Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1477156Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1477532Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1478228Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1478848Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1479443Z                 return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1479818Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1480029Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1480205Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1480887Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1481705Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1482306Z                   return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1482701Z                 }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1482916Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1483098Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1483835Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1484311Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1484780Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1485217Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1485733Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1486347Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1487034Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1487685Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1488151Z                   })
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1488530Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1488828Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1489009Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1489631Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1490243Z                   return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1490633Z                 }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1490841Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1491015Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1491570Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1492150Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1492470Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1492621Z                 try {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1493103Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1493876Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1494413Z                     body
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1494797Z                   });
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1495469Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1496269Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1496959Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1497670Z                   return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1498067Z                 }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1498414Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1498621Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1498768Z tools:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1499098Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1499432Z   github:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1499833Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1500497Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1501216Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1502000Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1502585Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1502838Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1502998Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1503358Z ---

2026-04-14T15:27:04.1536670Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1537072Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1537265Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1537964Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1538676Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1539158Z                 }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1539679Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1540377Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1540918Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1541346Z                 }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1541711Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1542108Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1542313Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1542528Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1543086Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1543760Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1544107Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1544289Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1545620Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1546932Z                 return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1547311Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1547517Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1547704Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1548284Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1548821Z                 try {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1549250Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1549826Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1550382Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1550866Z                   });
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1551312Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1551887Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1553039Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1554082Z                   });
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1554489Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1555118Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1555730Z                 }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1556116Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1556574Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1556788Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1556954Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1557477Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1558026Z                 return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1558396Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1558786Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1559419Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1560038Z                 return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1560413Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1560608Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1560806Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1561220Z               try {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1561863Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1562511Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1563260Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1564108Z                 return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1564493Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1564698Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1564974Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1565639Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1566194Z                 return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1566570Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1566774Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1567131Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1567827Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1568412Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1569008Z                 return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1569388Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1569590Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1569763Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1570444Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1571249Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1571842Z                   return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1572653Z                 }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1572888Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1573077Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1574133Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1574599Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1575056Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1575497Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1575995Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1576597Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1577282Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1577928Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1578400Z                   })
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1578786Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1579080Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1579263Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1579891Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1580508Z                   return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1580891Z                 }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1581130Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1581340Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1581892Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1582457Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1582765Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1582919Z                 try {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1583424Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1584177Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1584709Z                     body
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1585095Z                   });
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1585764Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1586590Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1587258Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1587934Z                   return;
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1588317Z                 }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1588671Z               }
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1588875Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1589023Z tools:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1589348Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1589698Z   github:
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1590033Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1590535Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1591368Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1592070Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1592728Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1592977Z 
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1593135Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1593854Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1594537Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (6762 chars):
2026-04-14T15:27:04.1626788Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues\n  Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,\n  predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides\n  analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links\n  Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository\n\non:\n  issues:\n    types: [opened]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      issue_number:\n        description: \"Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)\"\n        required: true\n        type: string\n  roles: all\n  reaction: eyes\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork:\n  allowed:\n    - defaults\n    - \"api.nuget.org\"\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  add-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  remove-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  add-comment:\n    max: 2\n    target: \"*\"\n  assign-to-user:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  close-issue:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    mention_owners:\n      description: \"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      output: \"Owner mention comment posted\"\n      permissions:\n        issues: write\n      inputs:\n        message:\n          description: \"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n        owners:\n          description: \"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n      steps:\n        - name: Post mention comment\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const fs = require('fs');\n              const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;\n\n              function resolveIssueNumber() {\n                if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {\n                  return context.issue.number;\n                }\n                const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);\n                if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {\n                  return parsed;\n                }\n                return null;\n              }\n\n              const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();\n              const owner = context.repo.owner;\n              const repo = context.repo.repo;\n\n              if (issueNumber === null) {\n                core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              async function failSafe(reason) {\n                core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.addLabels({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    labels: ['needs-team-triage']\n                  });\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'\n                  });\n                } catch (recoveryError) {\n                  core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);\n                }\n                core.setFailed(reason);\n              }\n\n              if (!outputFile) {\n                await failSafe('No agent output path provided');\n                return;\n              }\n              if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {\n                await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              let agentOutput;\n              try {\n                agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));\n              } catch (parseError) {\n                await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {\n                await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');\n              if (items.length === 0) {\n                await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              for (const item of items) {\n                if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {\n                  await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const mentions = item.owners\n                  .split(/[\\s,]+/)\n                  .map(s => s.trim())\n                  .filter(Boolean)\n                  .map(raw => {\n                    const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\\\?@/, '');\n                    if (/\\r|\\n/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    return `@${normalized}`;\n                  })\n                  .filter(Boolean);\n\n                if (mentions.length === 0) {\n                  await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const body = item.message\n                  ? `${item.message}\\n\\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`\n                  : mentions.join(' ');\n\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body\n                  });\n                  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);\n                } catch (apiError) {\n                  await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);\n                  return;\n                }\n              }\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues]\n    # Triage must read issues from all users, including external\n    # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the\n    # auto-applied \"approved\" policy filters them out via DIFC\n    min-integrity: none\n\ntimeout-minutes: 10"}
